Interface IArgStatisticsFunctionArguments2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control ArgStatisticsFunction arguments.

[Guid("DE592077-599E-436D-A66D-1DAE75412399")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IArgStatisticsFunctionArguments2 : IArgStatisticsFunctionArguments
